item.title: Lululemon backs nylon-recycling startup Syntetica in $30M Series A
item.dc:creator: Anna Heim
item.description: Syntetica, a French startup that has developed a novel approach to recycling nylon, has already obtained big-name partners and investors.

item.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
item.dc:creator: Ram Iyer
item.description: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.

item.title: Daniel Ek’s body-scanning startup Neko Health raises another $700M
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Neko Health has developed proprietary body-scanning technology, which it couples with bloodwork, to assess a person's health.

item.title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.

item.title: Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
item.dc:creator: Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: Can a handful of engineers really do the work of an army of consultants? That’s the bet behind Ode with Anthropic — the joint venture dedicated to embedding forward-deployed engineers in enterprise firms, backed by Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs and others.   On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Rebecca Bellan sits down with Ode’s leaders Chris Taylor and Eddie Siegel, who founded Fractional AI, […]

item.title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
item.description: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

item.title: Reelful’s AI turns your camera roll into short-form videos for social media
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The app is designed for people who want to create social content, but find traditional video editing tools too complex or time-consuming.

item.title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.

item.title: Backed by $60M in funding, Oak steps out of stealth to fix the identity mess that AI agents are making worse
item.dc:creator: Anna Heim
item.description: Co-founded by serial entrepreneur Shai Morag, Israeli identity management startup Oak is emerging out of stealth with $60 million in seed funding.

item.title: DeepSeek reportedly in talks to raise $1.5B, then IPO
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: DeepSeek, the Chinese large language model developer, is said to be preparing for a 2027 IPO debut as it also looks to raise around $1.5 billion in new funds at a $71 billion valuation.

item.title: Pinwheel launches a retro-inspired landline phone for kids
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: Kid-friendly tech company Pinwheel announced the launch of a new landline phone designed to let children stay connected without the distractions of a smartphone.

item.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta, Marina Temkin
item.description: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

item.title: Phia accused of ‘cookie stuffing,’ taking affiliate credit on purchases it didn’t earn
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation.

item.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan, Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

item.title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.

item.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
item.dc:creator: Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

item.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
item.dc:creator: Connie Loizos
item.description: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

item.title: Charles Hudson shares the common mistakes he’s seen after investing in 500+ startups
item.dc:creator: Maggie Nye
item.description: In this week’s episode of Build Mode, Isabelle Johannessen talks with Precursor Ventures' Charles Hudson about the headwinds facing early-stage founders today and the most common mistakes founders should avoid in order to get funded.

item.title: Mercor is in talks for a $20B valuation
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: A new $20 billion valuation would be a giant step up from the $10 billion valuation it reached in October.
